name: Ty Cobb
summary: Former White House lawyer who later called Trump a threat to democracy and said he was the greatest threat the country has faced.

keyStatements.quote: Trump is a 'deeply wounded narcissist' and a threat to democracy.
There is no question that he obstructed justice. It's not a close question.
keyStatements.context: On Trump's handling of classified documents

keyStatements.quote: He's the greatest threat this country has ever faced.
keyStatements.context: Interview warning about a second Trump term

timeline.event: Joined White House as Special Counsel
Called Trump a threat to democracy
timeline.significance: Spoke out after classified documents indictment

timeline.event: Called Trump the greatest threat the country has faced

credibility.background: Former White House Special Counsel, veteran lawyer with decades of experience

oppositionReasons: Called Trump a threat to democracy
Said Trump obstructed justice in the documents case
Called Trump the greatest threat the country has faced

sources.title: Ty Cobb calls Trump a threat to democracy, says he obstructed justice
